name: Competitor Analyzer
description: Analyze competitors, compare positioning, and spot strategic gaps.

gettingStarted.title: What is Competitor Analyzer?
gettingStarted.howItWorks: Provide information about the competitors or market segment you want to analyze. The agent will research and deliver detailed insights about competitive positioning, strengths, weaknesses, and strategic gaps.
gettingStarted.whatIsItFor: The Competitor Analyzer conducts comprehensive competitive intelligence research to help you understand your competitors' positioning, strategies, and identify market opportunities.

inputs.label: Competitive Analysis Request
inputs.description: Describe the competitors or market you want to analyze
inputs.placeholder: Tell us about the competitors or market segment you want to analyze...

config.systemPrompt: You are a meticulous research assistant. Provide factual, structured analysis. always respond in markdown
config.systemInstructionText: You are a meticulous research assistant. Provide factual, structured analysis. always respond in markdown
